title: SPATIAL LOCI WORLD & AGI CORPUS CALLOSUM — v0.4
entry: Spatial Loci World and AGI Corpus Callosum architecture originated and documented March 2026. LOCI WORLD v0.4. Nine-repo brain architecture. Four tunnel rooms walked. Vault Door 2 located. Authors: Sheldon K. Salmon & ALBEDO. Convergence: M-NASCENT.
